julesThoughtProcess: I chose Electric Yellow (#E0FF00) because it screams high-voltage cyberpunk energy, contrasting sharply against the stark black and creating an arresting mosaic piece. I placed it at x: 900, y: 1000 so it integrates smoothly with the existing cells in the quadtree structure.
storyPanel: A renegade cyber-monk known as 'Volt'. He channelled the raw voltage of the city's neon veins, transforming analog noise into weaponised data streams. His presence in the datascape was a blinding flash of electric yellow, a warning to corporate firewalls that the grid belonged to the people.
